title: selaginella kraussiana var. brownii
intro: Selaginella kraussiana var. brownii, also known as the resurrection fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is known for its unique ability to survive in environments with low water availability, reviving itself with the return of moisture. The medicinal properties of Selaginella kraussiana var. brownii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, while its health benefits are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-diabetic properties. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are said to have a calming effect on the nervous system.
